attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,COALESCE(LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))              
,-1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,COALESCE(CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,-1)
,COALESCE(DETAIL_POSTING_ALLOWED_FLAG,'N')
,COALESCE(DETAIL_BUDGETING_ALLOWED_FLAG,'N')
,COALESCE(ACCOUNT_TYPE,'E')                  
,COALESCE(ENABLED_FLAG,'N')                  		
,'N' AS SUMMARY_FLAG                  
,SEGMENT1                      
,SEGMENT2                      
,SEGMENT3                      
,SEGMENT4                      
,SEGMENT5                      
,SEGMENT6                      
,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
,'N' AS PRESERVE_FLAG                 
,COMPANY_COST_CENTER_ORG_ID    
,REVALUATION_ID                
,LEDGER_SEGMENT                
,LEDGER_TYPE_CODE              
,ALTERNATE_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
,'ERPCLOUD' AS GLOBAL_NAME
,COALESCE(CREATE_DATETIME, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))             
FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
WHERE CREATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CODE_COMBINATION_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1
